themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Covers AI agents that can autonomously perform research tasks, collaborate, and manage workflows.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Focuses on AI tools that help developers write, debug, and understand code.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles discussing various AI tools and platforms designed to aid in research processes.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Highlights AI applications that condense large amounts of text or data into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: Explores how AI is being applied to product strategy, planning, and execution.

themes.name: AI summarization insights
themes.description: Focuses on AI's ability to not only summarize but also extract actionable insights from content.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Discusses AI's role in automating or augmenting usability testing processes.

themes.name: AI recruitment research
themes.description: Examines how AI is being used to analyze the labor market, job roles, and hiring processes.

themes.name: AI qualitative research
themes.description: Covers AI applications that assist in analyzing and understanding qualitative data and user feedback.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: Articles detailing AI tools and methodologies that assist in both the design and research phases of product development.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
